title: Settings
appearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of the application.
aiConfigDesc: Select the underlying AI model for all AI-powered features.
diagnosticsDesc: Verify connectivity, logic engines, and autonomous agents across the platform.
dataPortabilityDesc: Save your entire workspace to a local JSON file or restore from a backup.
dangerZoneDesc: Reset the application state to the default mock data. This action cannot be undone.
